summary: Iteration 30: SportLyo Phase 1 Modifications - ALL 3 FEATURES VERIFIED AND WORKING. Feature 1: Organizer can delete provider products (Lock icon + 'Produit prestataire' text + delete button). Feature 2: Provider Import TopTex section has PDF upload removed, only reference search remains. Feature 3: Organizer product cards are in portrait format (aspect-[3/4]) with image carousel support.
passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/organizer/products/{product_id} works for provider-source products
Backend: GET /api/organizer/products returns products with source='provider' field
Backend: Reference lookup endpoint GET /api/provider/import/lookup/{ref} works
Frontend: Provider products in organizer space show Lock icon
Frontend: Provider products show 'Produit prestataire' text
Frontend: Provider products have red delete button (Trash2 icon)
Frontend: Organizer product cards use portrait format (aspect-[3/4])
Frontend: Provider dashboard Import TopTex section has NO PDF upload UI
Frontend: Provider dashboard Import TopTex section has 'Recherche par reference' input
Frontend: Provider dashboard Import TopTex section has 'RECHERCHER' button
Frontend: Provider catalog tab in organizer space uses portrait format cards (9 cards verified)
Frontend: Provider catalogue in provider dashboard uses portrait format cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified all Phase 1 modifications. Feature 1: OrganizerDashboard.js lines 2105-2112 show provider products with Lock icon, 'Produit prestataire' text, and delete button (data-testid='delete-provider-product-{id}'). Feature 2: ProviderDashboard.js lines 406-469 show Import TopTex section with ONLY reference search (lookup) - PDF upload completely removed. Feature 3: OrganizerDashboard.js line 2058 and 2195 use aspect-[3/4] for portrait format. Backend shop.py line 68 handles DELETE /api/organizer/products/{product_id}.

feature_1_delete_provider_products.description: Organizer can delete provider products from their selection

feature_2_pdf_upload_removed.description: Provider Import TopTex section no longer shows PDF upload UI - only reference search

feature_3_portrait_cards.description: Organizer product cards are in portrait format (aspect-[3/4]) with image carousel
